_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source preset(s) for mealie-mcp (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Declarative: server + condensed tool + action + field map. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS. Recipes are the primary durable modality; the mealie_ingest_recipes tool is the richer native (typed :Recipe + :Ingredient + image blobs) path.
